business_ideas.idea: AI Companion/Therapist - AI friend for loneliness epidemic, outcompeting human therapists on cost
AI Spotify - generative music platform with NFT ownership of AI-generated songs
Jasper AI - AI writing assistant generating emails, blog posts, ads
Interior AI - generate interior design renderings from photos
Dream Booth - AI product photography replacing studio sessions
Carter - AI NPCs for video games enabling natural conversations

predictions.text: Next 10 years dominated by right-brain creative AI replacing human artists in text, image, video, music
AI companion/therapist is tens-of-billions opportunity solving loneliness epidemic
Music generation model will train on all Spotify music and disrupt music industry economics
